<!-- Keep the change focused. See CONTRIBUTING.md before opening. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation or examples
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor or internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and the related issue is linked when one exists.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated for behavior changes and regressions.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and executable examples are updated when needed.
- [ ] Relevant lint, format, type, test, documentation, and pre-commit checks pass locally.
- [ ] The diff is self-reviewed, with generated files, debug output, secrets, and unrelated changes removed.
- [ ] Remaining limitations, skipped cases, and environment-specific behavior are explained below.

## Notes

<!-- Limitations, skipped cases, backend-parity or reproducibility caveats, follow-ups. -->
